scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @deskcall/shared && concurrently -k -n server,desktop -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:desktop"
scripts.dev:server: npm run build --workspace @deskcall/shared && npm run dev --workspace @deskcall/server
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run build --workspace @deskcall/shared && npm run dev --workspace @deskcall/desktop
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @deskcall/shared && npm run build --workspace @deskcall/server && npm run build --workspace @deskcall/desktop
scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace @deskcall/shared && npm run build:renderer --workspace @deskcall/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @deskcall/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @deskcall/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @deskcall/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @deskcall/desktop
scripts.package:windows: npm run build --workspace @deskcall/shared && npm run package:windows --workspace @deskcall/desktop
